name: Sanbei Sauce
steps: In Large Cooking pan /medium heat roasted off Ginger until light golden colour after add Garlic.
Add Spring onion, Red chillies. Continue cooking for 5 min after add Rock sugar.
Continue cooking until sugar dissolved, then add Vine, vinegar and deglaze for 1 min.
Add all remaining ingredients, bring to the boil, leave for 5 min and turn it off.
Leave Sauce to set on the side for 1 hour to infuse flavour.
After cooled down, leave with all ingredients inside 10ltr container in walking fridge.
